message:
test(bd-xoqo): add unit tests for bidirectional.rs transport senders

Cover lock_pending poison recovery, TransportSamplingSender::create_message
(text, image, model hints, assistant role), TransportElicitationSender::elicit
(form accept with all content value types, decline, url mode),
TransportRootsProvider::list_roots (populated and empty).

Server tests: 1253 → 1263

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
